title: Custom PCB Fabrication & Assembly Services | JHYPCB
metaDescription: JHYPCB offers custom PCB fabrication, prototyping, and assembly services in China. Get high-quality, quick-turn PCBs at competitive prices. Request a free quote today!
h1: Custom PCB Solutions for Your Needs

headings.text: Custom PCB Solutions for Your Needs
Why Choose a Custom PCB Manufacturer?
Why Choose JHYPCB for Custom PCBs?

paragraphs: JHYPCB is a reliable PCB manufacturer in China and offers rapid PCB prototype service for quick-turn PCB fabrication at high quality and low cost. We can prototype your PCB within 3-7 days.

JHYPCB offers full feature PCB manufacturing services with high reliability to be compatible with your requirement. PCB fabrication services include rigid FR4 PCB, Flexible PCB, Rigid-flex PCB, HDI PCB, High-Frequency PCB, Rogers PCB, Multilayer PCB, Heavy Copper PCB, etc.
Full turnkey PCB assembly services in China. JHYPCB specializes in prototype PCB assembly, quick turn PCB assembly, and low-to-high volume PCB assembly services with production capabilities.

We are a leading PCB manufacturing & PCB assembly manufacturer and supplier in China. We have over ten years of experience in custom PCB fabrication and assembly with advanced PCB technology, high-quality standards & RoHS compliance.

A full-service electronic manufacturing company headquartered in China specializes in printed circuit board manufacturing and assembly services. We will provide a full range of technical support and services for the smooth progress of your project.

Home Services Projects Custom PCB Solutions for Your Needs JHYPCB, a trusted PCB manufacturer in China, delivers high-quality custom PCB fabrication, prototyping, and assembly services. From single-sided to 64-layer multilayer PCBs, we offer quick-turn solutions at competitive prices.

JHYPCB is a leading custom PCB manufacturer in China , specializing in tailored circuit boards for projects of all sizes. Whether you need a single prototype or mass production, our advanced technology ensures precision and reliability.

Need a reliable prototype for your project? JHYPCB offers affordable custom PCB prototyping services, perfect for startups, engineers, and R&D teams. Our prototyping process is streamlined to support rapid iterations and flawless performance.

Time is critical in PCB projects. JHYPCB’s quick-turn PCB fabrication services deliver high-quality boards in record time. Serving over 1,000 customers in 30+ countries, we ensure on-time delivery without compromising quality.

JHYPCB offers comprehensive turnkey PCB assembly services , encompassing component sourcing , assembly , and final testing. Our automated processes ensure precision and reliability, saving you time and effort.
JHYPCB excels in manufacturing complex multilayer PCBs , supporting up to 64 layers for advanced applications. From high-frequency to rigid-flex PCBs, we handle the most demanding designs.

Custom PCBs offer unmatched reliability and compactness compared to breadboards or homemade solutions. At JHYPCB, we use cutting-edge technology to deliver durable, high-performance boards tailored to your specifications.
